Drivers and functions for managing various flash memory operations, including initialization, read, write, erase, and protection.

## Folders
- **[micron_n25q](micron_n25q/README.md)**: Drivers and functions for managing Micron N25Q flash memory operations, including core dump support.

## Files
- **[cd_flash_driver.c](cd_flash_driver.c.md)**: A flash driver for coredump support, including initialization, erase, write, and read functions.
- **[flash_api.c](flash_api.c.md)**: Flash memory management and analytics for Pebble firmware, including read, write, erase, and protection operations.
- **[flash_crc.c](flash_crc.c.md)**: Functions for calculating CRC32 and legacy defective checksums on flash memory data.
- **[flash_erase.c](flash_erase.c.md)**: Implements asynchronous flash memory erase operations with mutex locking and callback handling.
- **[flash_impl.h](flash_impl.h.md)**: Low-level API for flash memory operations, including initialization, read/write, erase, and power management.
- **[flash_internal.h](flash_internal.h.md)**: Declares the function `flash_erase_init` for initializing flash memory erasure.
- **[gd25lq255e.c](gd25lq255e.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the GD25LQ255E flash memory, including read, write, erase, and power management functions.
- **[mt25q.c](mt25q.c.md)**: Driver implementation for MT25Q flash memory, including functions for read, write, erase, and power modes.
- **[mx25u.c](mx25u.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the MX25U flash memory, including functions for read, write, erase, and protection.
- **[nvram_bkp.c](nvram_bkp.c.md)**: Manages NVRAM erase status using RTC backup registers for STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[qspi_flash.c](qspi_flash.c.md)**: Driver implementation for QSPI flash memory operations, including initialization, read, write, erase, and protection functions.
- **[qspi_flash.h](qspi_flash.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, reading, writing, erasing, and managing QSPI flash memory operations.
- **[qspi_flash_definitions.h](qspi_flash_definitions.h.md)**: Defines data structures and enumerations for QSPI flash state, read, and write modes.
- **[qspi_flash_part_definitions.h](qspi_flash_part_definitions.h.md)**: Defines the `QSPIFlashPart` structure and `JESD216Dw15QerType` enumeration for QSPI flash memory operations.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Documentation for flash memory drivers, detailing main and alternate APIs for flash access.
- **[spansion_s29vs.c](spansion_s29vs.c.md)**: Driver implementation for Spansion S29VS flash memory, including functions for initialization, read, write, erase, and protection operations.
- **[xt25f64b.c](xt25f64b.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the XT25F64B flash memory, including initialization, read, write, and power management functions.
